ember-community-russia/awesome-ember

3 months ago  145
A curated list of awesome Ember.js stuff like addons, articles, videos, gists and more.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Awesome Ember.js


A curated list of delightful Ember.js packages and resources.


Ember.js Myths    Readers Questions    Contribute to Ember.js


Just type ember.cool OR https://ember-community-russia.github.io/awesome-ember/ to go here.

Ember.js is a JavaScript framework that greatly reduces the time, effort and resources needed to build any web application. It is focused on making you, the developer, as productive as possible by doing all the common, repetitive, yet essential, tasks involved in most web development projects.

Ember.js also provides access to the most advanced features of JavaScript, HTML and the Browser giving you everything you need to create your next killer web app.

You might also like awesome-javascriptstars24k. Please read the contribution guidelines before contributing.

Packages

AST

  • ember-ast-helpersstars40 - This library is a utility belt to make AST transforms and shield users as much as possible from the nuances of the AST, as it is still private API.
  • ember-template-recaststars32 - Non-destructive template transformer.
  • jscodeshiftstars6.4k - A JavaScript codemod toolkit.
  • dyfactorstars8 - A platform for running codemods based on runtime information.

a11y

  • ember-accessibilitystars31 - Addon to help identify accessibility violations during development.
  • e-a11y-modalstars7 - A simple modal for accessible Ember.js applications.
  • ember-a11y-landmarksstars19 - Ember.js addon to help with landmark roles for better accessibility.
  • ember-a11ystars85 - A collection of tools to build accessible Ember.js applications.
  • ember-component-focusstars21 - A mixin for adding methods to your Ember.js components that help you manage the currently focused element.
  • ember-gesturesstars160 - Ember.js gestures provides an easy way to use gestures by making it simple to define and use HammerJS managers and recognizers throughout your app.
  • ember-stepsstars3 - Declarative create wizards, tabbed UIs, and more.
  • ember-page-titlestars179 - Page title management for Ember.js Apps.
  • ember-self-focused - Focus on route on transition.
  • ember-keyboardstars148 - An Ember.js addon for the painless support of keyboard events.
  • ember-a11y-testingstars129 - A suite of accessibility tests that can be run within the Ember.js testing framework.
  • a11y-announcerstars41 - An accessible ember route change announcer.
  • ember-a11y-refocusstars7 - Provides an unobtrusive navigation narration element for Ember applications.

Adapters

  • ember-cli-markdown-resolverstars24 - Ember CLI addon for resolving markdown files in custom folders and retrieving content via a service.
  • ember-cloud-firestore-adapterstars52 - Unofficial Ember Data Adapter and Serializer for Cloud Firestore.
  • ember-data-hal-9000stars38 - An ember-data compatible ember-cli addon that provides a HAL adapter (HATEOAS).
  • ember-django-adapterstars191 - Ember CLI addon adapter for Django REST Framework.
  • ember-graphql-adapterstars242 - GraphQL adapter for Ember Data.
  • ember-indexeddbstars12 - Utilities & adapter to work with IndexedDB in ember & ember-data.
  • ember-localforage-adapterstars135 - Offline usage for Ember Data.
  • ember-local-storagestars215 - The addon provides a storage for computed property that returns a proxy and persists the changes to localStorage or sessionStorage.
  • ember-pouchstars278 - PouchDB/CouchDB adapter for Ember Data.
  • ember-wordpressstars95 - The bridge between Ember.js and WordPress.
  • emberfirestars692 - Official Ember Data adapter for Firebase.
  • ninjafirestars31 - An ORM for Firebase written in Typescript.

Animations

  • ember-animatedstars221 - Web Animations with Ember js
  • liquid-firestars1.2k - Animations & transitions for ambitious Ember.js applications.

Authentication

  • ember-cli-simple-auth-extensions
  • ember-simple-authstars1.9k - A library for implementing authentication/authorization in Ember.js applications.
  • toristars769 - A set of clean abstractions for authentication in Ember.js.

Automation

  • ember-cli-deploystars566 - A deployment pipeline for Ember CLI apps.
  • ember-cli-deploy-webhooksstars20 - Ember CLI Deploy plugin for calling webhooks during deployments.
  • ember-cli-releasestars92 - Ember CLI addon for versioned release management.
  • ember-cli-sristars47 - This plugin is used to generate Subresource Integrity (SRI) hashes for ember applications.
  • ember-cli-dependency-lintstars74 - Lint your app's addon dependencies, making sure you only have one version of each.

Benchmarking

  • ember-macro-benchmarkstars26 - Benchmark recording of an ember app with running with 2 versions of Ember.js.
  • ember-performancestars140 - A suite of tests for Ember.js to help with performance.
  • emberperf - Ember.js Performance (Between versions).

Blogging

  • empress-blogstars158 - Fully-functional, SEO friendly static site implementation of a blog system built on Ember.js.
  • ember-cli-blogstars88 - Tom Dale's blog example updated for the Ember CLI.
  • ember-tumblrstars8 - Ember.js Addon for integrating a Tumblr blog.

Babel

  • ember-cli-babel-plugin-helpersstars3 - Utilities for managing Babel plugins in Ember CLI apps and addons.

Boilerplating

  • ember-boilerplatestars30 - The stable base upon which we build our Ember.js projects at Mirego.

Broccoli

  • broccoli-concat-analyserstars123 - Assets profiling.
  • broccoli-debugstars10 - Utility for build pipeline authors to allow trivial debugging of the Broccoli pipelines they author.
  • broccoli-stewstars61 - Provides commonly used convenience functions for developing broccoli based build pipelines.
  • broccolijs-tutorialstars14 - Broccoli.js Tutorial repository.
  • broccoli-rollupstars35 - Broccoli Plugin For "Rollup".
  • broccoli-manifeststars39 - HTML5 cache-manifest compilation for broccoli.
  • broccoli-glowstars3 - Dynamic component creation from single file, etc.

Broccoli read

  • Debugging a Broccoli Tree
  • Debugging Broccoli and Ember-CLI
  • Debugging Ember-cli Build Times
  • Eat Your Greens - A Broccoli.js tutorial
  • Ember.js Lazy Assets: Fingerprinting & loading static/dynamic assets on demand
  • Thoughts on how to write faster broccoli plugins

Build tools

  • Broccolistars3.3k - Fast, reliable asset pipeline, supporting constant-time rebuilds and compact build definitions.

Charts

  • ember-chartsstars797 - A charting library built with the Ember.js and d3.js frameworks.
  • ember-sparklesstars56 - Collection of composable D3 components built with ember-d3-helpers.

CI/CD

  • ember-cli-server-variablesstars31 - An Ember CLI add-on to support adding variables to the generated index.html file's head tag.
  • ember-cistars25 - Continuous integration goodies for ember.js apps.
  • CI with GitHub Actions for Ember Apps - Reducing CI runtimes with GitHub Actions
  • CI with GitHub Actions for Ember Apps: Part 2 - Migrating to v2 actions, lowering runtime cost and continuously deployment

Code Splitting

  • ember-enginesstars486 - This Ember.js addon implements the functionality described in the Ember.js Engines RFC. Engines allow multiple logical applications to be composed together into a single application from the user's perspective.
  • ember-lazy-mountstars12 - Allow {{mount}} lazy loading route-less engines.
  • ember-cli-bundle-loaderstars22 - Addon to allow for multiple bundles and do lazy loading.
  • ember-cli-lazy-loadstars41 - Support lazily loading your Ember.js app via splitting it up into Bundles.

Codestyle

  • ember-cli-template-lintstars157 - Ember CLI integration for ember-template-lint.
  • ember-cli-alexstars7 - Alex for Ember.js apps.
  • ember-prop-typesstars81 - Improved property management for Ember.js apps and addons.

Command-line apps

  • ember-cli-createstars65 - CLI wizard to create a new ember project.
  • @ember/optional-featuresstars39 - This addon allows you to easily enable/disable optional features in ember-source. To clarify what we mean by optional, these are features that will be opt-in/opt-out and optional for the foreseeable future, not features that will be enabled by default. It is intended for use with apps only not addons.
  • ember-cli-renamestars9 - Addon for ember-cli that provides an ember rename command.

Command-line utilities

  • ember-cli-updatestars266 - Update Ember CLI Ember.js apps, addons and Glimmer.js apps.
  • ember-cli-deprecation-workflowstars157 - An addon geared towards making Ember.js upgrades easier by allowing you to work through deprecations without massive console noise.

Component addons

  • ember-diff-attrsstars28
  • ember-compatibility-helpersstars24 - Helpers that allow you to write backwards compatible Ember.js addons.

Compression

  • ember-cli-deploy-brotlistars6 - Ember.js deploy plugin to support brotli compression.

Content management systems

  • ember-adminstars246 - Automatically discover your models and interact with all model data in a simple CRUD interface.
  • https://authmaker.com/ - Go from zero to fully functioning and live MVP in 3 days.

Control flow

  • Promises
    • ember-computed-promise-monitorstars11 - Enable computed properties to be async-aware.
  • Observables
    • ember-rxstars9 - RxJS 6 integration for Ember.js.
  • Generators
    • ember-concurrencystars663 - Ember.js Addon that enables you to write concise, worry-free, cancelable, restartable, asynchronous tasks.
    • ember-master-tabstars9 - A library that provides a service which helps running a function on only one tab of an Ember application.

CSS & etc

  • ember-cli-stylelintstars46 - Adds styleint to your ember app, to lint all kinds of css.
  • ember-cli-autoprefixerstars103 - Automatically run your styles through autoprefixer.
  • ember-cli-sassstars280 - Use node-sass to preprocess your ember-cli app's files, with support for sourceMaps and include paths.
  • ember-cli-sass-podsstars63 - Enjoy styling your pods with the sass style file in the pod directory.
  • ember-component-cssstars539 - An Ember CLI addon which allows you to specify styles for individual components.
  • ember-cli-postcssstars98 - A PostCSS integration for ember-cli.
  • ember-css-modulesstars276 - CSS Modules for ambitious applications.
  • ember-cli-tailwindstars96 - Tailwind is a utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom user interfaces.
  • ember-emotionstars11 - Use emotion styling in Ember.js.
  • css-blocksstars6.3k - High performance, maintainable stylesheets.
  • ember-cli-eyeglass - This Ember CLI Addon makes it trivial to compile your sass files with eyeglass support via node-sass.

Fonts

  • ember-cli-webfontstars21 - Easily generate webfonts from svg files as part of your ember-cli build process.

State management

  • ember-buffered-proxystars169
  • ember-changesetstars423
  • ember-cerebraljsstars4 - Enhanced state management for complex Ember.js apps using Cerebral.
  • ember-redux - Predictable state management for ember apps.
  • ember-state-servicesstars231
  • ember-time-machinestars112

Styling kits

  • ember-cli-tailwindstars96 - Adds Tailwind CSS to your app or addon.

Data Management

  • ember-apollo-clientstars263 - An ember-cli addon for Apollo Client and GraphQL.
  • ember-cli-sofastars4 - CouchDB persistence library for Ember.js.
  • ember-orbitstars313 - Ember.js data layer built with Orbit.js.
  • ember-data-storefrontstars141 - A collection of APIs that address common data-loading issues.
  • ember-m3stars78 - This addon provides an alternative model implementation to DS.Model.
  • ember-cli-zuglet - Ember.js addon for effortless Firebase integration.

Data manipulation & Computed

  • ember-awesome-macrosstars209 - A collection of Ember.js computed macros.
  • ember-cpmstars278 - Computed property Macros for Ember.js.
  • ember-macaronistars98 - Keep your app code DRY and copypasta free with computed property macaronis (macros).

Data validation

  • ember-cp-validationsstars442 - Ember.js computed property based validations.
  • ember-changeset-validationsstars214 - Validations for ember-changeset.
  • ember-model-validatorstars141 - Add validations to your Ember Data models on an explicit and easy way, without a bunch a validations files around or complicated structure.
  • ember-validated-formstars58 - Easily create forms with client side validations.
  • ember-line-graph - Zero-dependency ember-addon to draw line-charts.

Database

  • ember-indexeddbstars12 - Utilities & adapter to work with IndexedDB in ember & ember-data.

Date

  • ember-momentstars398 - Template helpers and computed property macros for moment.js and Ember.js.

Debugging / Profiling

  • ember-debug-loggerstars36 - Exposes the visionmedia/debug library for use in your Ember.js application.
  • ember-devtoolsstars163 - A collection of useful Ember.js debugging functions.
  • ember-chrome-devtoolsstars99 - Chrome DevTools addon for Ember.js.
  • ember-cli-bundle-analyzerstars81 - An Ember CLI addon to analyze the size and contents of your app's bundled output, using an interactive zoomable treemap.
  • ember-perf-timelinestars97 - Add performance information to Chrome's Timeline for Ember.js applications.
  • ember-cli-route-mapstars15 - Command to generate a route map of your Ember.js application.
  • heimdalljs-visualizerstars18 - Visualizer for heimdalljs data.
  • source-map-explorerstars3.2k - Analyze and debug space usage through source maps.
  • ember-dead-codestars5 - Detect dead code with confidence via real user monitoring.

Decorators

  • Macro Decorators - DRY your code by creating decorators that duplicated getter/setter's functionality

Documentation

  • ember-cli-addon-docsstars163 - Easy, beautiful docs for your Ember.js addon.
  • ember-cli-jsdocstars23 - An Ember.js CLI addon to generate HTML documentation from JSDoc comments in the source code.
  • ember-freestylestars260 - Ember-freestyle is an Ember.js addon that allows you to quickly create a component explorer for your Ember.js app.

Ember-inspector roadmaps & overview

  • Ember Inspector Pairing
  • Ember Inspector Sync

End-user customization

  • ember-asset-loaderstars32 - Asset loading support for Ember.js applications.
  • ember-experiments - Experimentation, A/B Split Testing addon for Ember.js.
  • ember-cli-hot-loaderstars101 - An early look at what hot reloading might be like in the ember ecosystem.
  • ember-ast-hot-loadstars86 - Universal hot-load addon.
  • ember-cli-build-notificationsstars22 - Notifications when ember-cli has a build error.
  • ember-feature-flagsstars212 - An ember-cli addon to provide feature flags.
  • ember-named-yieldsstars17 - Named Yields for Ember.js Components.
  • ember-islandsstars245 - Render Ember.js components anywhere on a server-rendered page to create "Islands of Richness".
  • ember-wormholestars286 - Render a child view somewhere else in the DOM.
  • ember-stargatestars49 - A modern take on using so called "portals" to render things in a different place of the DOM tree than they are logically defined in the app.

ES6

  • ember-concurrency-decoratorsstars72 - Decorator syntax for declaring/configuring ember-concurrency tasks.
  • ember-decoratorsstars360 - Useful decorators for Ember.js applications.
  • @ember-decorators/argumentstars31 - Decorators for Component and Object arguments in Ember.js.
  • sparkles-decoratorsstars2 - Decorators for Sparkles/Glimmer.js Components.

External Components Integration

  • ember-glimmer-componentstars9 - Glimmer.js-like components in Ember.js.
  • sparkles-componentstars43 - Addon used to experiment with @glimmer.js/component style APIs in Ember.js apps via existing public APIs.
  • hooked-componentsstars31 - Custom components for Ember.js, inspired by React Hooks approach.
  • ember-functional-componentstars11 - Attempting to use "pure functions" as components.
  • ember-lifecycle-componentstars7 - A component with additional lifecycles for times when you may need need a template.
  • ember-vue-componentsstars9 - Vue.JS component API for Ember.
  • @alexlafroscia/ember-cli-reactstars44 - Render React components in Ember.js.
  • @AltSchool/ember-cli-reactstars65 - Use React component hierarchies in your Ember.js app.

Forms

  • ember-cli-crudities - Form and editable list builder that works from json config which can be either statically or dynamically loaded.
  • ember-form-forstars136 - This Ember.js addon will give you an easy way to build good forms.

Functional programming

  • Bacon.js - Functional reactive programming.
  • Folktale - Suite of libraries for generic functional programming in JavaScript that allows you to write elegant, modular applications with fewer bugs, and more reuse.
  • immutablestars31k - Immutable data collections.
  • Kefir.jsstars1 - Reactive library with focus on high performance and low memory usage.
  • Lazy.jsstars6k - Utility library similar to lodash/Underscore but with lazy evaluation, which can translate to superior performance in many cases.
  • lodash - Utility library delivering consistency, customization, performance, & extras. A better and faster Underscore.js.
  • mori - Library for using ClojureScript's persistent data structures and supporting API from the comfort of vanilla JavaScript.
  • Mout - Utility library with the biggest difference between other existing solutions is that you can choose to load only the modules/functions that you need, no extra overhead.
  • Ramda - Utility library with a focus on flexible functional composition enabled by automatic currying and reversed argument order. Avoids mutating data.
  • RxJS - Functional reactive library for transforming, composing, and querying various kinds of data.
  • underscore-contrib - The brass buckles on Underscore's utility belt.

HTTP

  • ember-ajaxstars218 - Service for making AJAX requests in Ember.js 1.13+ applications.
  • ember-socket-guru - Addon for easy integration with Pusher.js, Action Cable, Socket.io and Phoenix Channels.

Helpers

  • ember-event-helpersstars31 - Complimentary event template helpers to the {{on}} modifier.
  • ember-render-helpersstars19 - @ember/render-modifiers as template helpers.
  • ember-element-helperstars34 - Dynamic element helper for Glimmer templates.
  • ember-composable-helpersstars616 - Composable helpers for declarative templating in Ember.js.
  • ember-helpers - A collection of handlebars helpers for Ember.js.
  • ember-d3-helpersstars35 - Collection of Ember.js helpers for building composable D3 charts.
  • ember-math-helpersstars97 - Ember.js HTMLBars helpers for basic arithmetic.
  • ember-promise-helpersstars199 - Promise-y sugar for your Ember.js templates.
  • ember-route-action-helperstars338 - Bubble closure actions in routes.
  • ember-root-urlstars11 - A template helper to keep your URLs relative to the app's rootURL.
  • ember-store-helpersstars5 - This add-on provides helpers related to ember-data.
  • ember-truth-helpersstars687 - Ember.js HTMLBars Helpers for {{if}} & {{unless}}: not, and, or, eq & is-array.
  • ember-awesome-macrosstars209 - A collection of Ember.js computed macros.
  • ember-macro-helpersstars62 - Ember.js macro helpers for making your own fancy macros!
  • ember-cli-string-helpersstars69 - Set of the String helpers extracted from DockYard's ember-composable-helpers.

Image

  • ember-svg-jarstars234 - The best way to embed SVG images into your Ember.js application.

Include external JS code

  • ember-auto-importstars343 - Zero config import from npm packages.
  • ember-cli-cjs-transformstars45 - CommonJS imports.
  • ember-cli-es6-transformstars15 - Import ES6 modules from npm, bower or anywhere else in your app.
  • ember-browserifystars175 - Addon for easily loading CommonJS packages from npm via browserify.

Infinite Scroll

  • ember-infinitystars370 - Simple, flexible Infinite Scroll for Ember CLI Apps.
  • vertical-collectionstars146 - Infinite Scroll and Occlusion at > 60 FPS.
  • smoke-and-mirrorsstars277 - Ambitious infinite-scroll and svelte rendering for ambitious applications.

Internalization & Localization

  • ember-intlstars415 - Translate complex messages string. Localized formatting for date/time, number, and relative time.
  • ember-intl-analyzerstars34 - Find unused translations in your Ember.js projects.

Inputs

  • ember-autoresizestars90 - Autoresize for Ember.js Components.

Job queues

  • ember-data-tasksstars24
  • ember-concurrency
  • ember-custom-actionsstars71 - Custom API actions for Ember.js applications.
  • ember-pipelinestars17
  • ember-lifelinestars240 - An ember addon for managing the life cycle of asynchronous behavior in your objects.

Logging

  • console.re
  • ember-debug-logger - An Ember.js addon to expose the Visionmedia debug logger.
  • ember-logging-servicestars4 - This addon provides a general and extensible logging service that can be used throughout your application.
  • raygun

Mad science

  • ember-elmstars55 - Write Elm in your Ember.js app.
  • javascript-algorithmsstars106.8k - Algorithms and data structures implemented in JavaScript with explanations and links to further readings.

Math

  • ember-katexstars1 - Render your LaTeX formulas using KaTeX.
  • ember-math-helpersstars97 - Ember.js HTMLBars helpers for basic arithmetic.

Metrics

  • ember-user-activitystars103 - Ember.js Addon for tracking user activity & idling.
  • ember-metricsstars357 - Send data to multiple analytics services without re-implementing new API.

Minifiers

  • ember-hbs-minifierstars44 - Stripping whitespace out of your Handlebars templates.
  • ember-cli-template-trimmerstars2 - This addon removes newlines on compile stage.

Miscellaneous

  • diagonal routes - See what route structure, templates and route hooks are for a given ember route definition.
  • ember data model makerstars152 - Ember Data Model Maker (EDMM).

Mobile

  • corberstars329 - Tooling for cordova and crosswalk hybrid applications built with Ember.js.
  • glimmer-nativestars81 - Have you ever wanted to use Ember.js/Glimmer.js to create a native mobile app? Well now you can!
  • ember-mobile-barstars7 - Managed fixed (tool)bars with mobile app-like behaviour.
  • ember-mobile-corestars12 - Provides a pan recognizer and some utils for the ember-mobile-* addons.
  • ember-mobile-menustars27 - Draggable sidebar specifically tailored to mobile devices.
  • ember-mobile-panestars4 - Mobile layout ember-mobile-pane.
  • ember-responsivestars35 - Easy responsive layouts with Ember.js.

Modifiers

  • ember-css-varsstars4 - A ember modifier to apply css variables. This gives a save way to expose data from JavaScript to css.
  • ember-on-modifierstars35 - An implementation of the {{on}} element modifier shown in the Modifiers RFC #353.
  • ember-ref-modifierstars43 - An implementation of the {{ref}} element modifier.
  • ember-render-modifiersstars67 - Implements did-insert / did-update / will-destroy modifiers for RFC #415.
  • ember-functional-modifiersstars39 - Functional Modifiers for Ember.js.
  • ember-style-modifierstars23 - This addon provides a {{style}} element modifier to set element's style.
  • ember-simple-animatestars8 - Simple ember animate addon for CSS based animations.

Parcel

  • ember-parcel-examplestars1 - Ember.js + Parcel.js Example.
  • todomvc-demostars1 - Glimmer.js + Parcel.js Example.

Payments

  • ember-credit-cardstars85 - "make your credit card form dreamy in one line of code".

Polyfills

  • ember-modifier-manager-polyfillstars10 - Polyfill element modifiers for Ember.js 2.12 through 3.7.
  • ember-angle-bracket-invocation-polyfillstars79 - This addon provides a polyfill for angle bracket invocation syntax as described in RFC 311.
  • ember-named-arguments-polyfillstars19 - Polyfills support for named arguments for Ember.js 2.10 through 3.0.
  • ember-native-class-polyfillstars8 - This addon provides a polyfill for the native class behavior that was proposed in Ember.js RFCs #240 and #337.
  • ember-router-service-polyfillstars37 - This addon provides a best effort polyfill for the ember-routing-router-service feature added in Ember.js 2.15.
  • ember-fn-helper-polyfillstars5 - This addon provides a polyfill for the {{fn}} helper as described in RFCs #470.
  • ember-named-blocks-polyfillstars37 - This addon provides a polyfill for the Yieldable Named Blocks feature.

PWA

  • ember-service-worker-asset-cachestars27
  • ember-service-worker-cache-fallbackstars16
  • ember-service-worker-cache-firststars7
  • ember-service-worker-indexstars17
  • ember-service-worker-premberstars6
  • ember-service-workerstars229 - A pluggable approach to Service Workers for Ember.js.
  • ember-web-appstars143 - This Ember.js addon helps you configure and manage the manifest.json and meta tags needed to create progressive web applications.

Query Params

  • ember-query-params-servicestars52 - Do you have controllers that only parse query params?
  • ember-parachutestars201 - Improved Query Params for Ember.js.
  • ember-href-tostars194 - A lightweight alternative to {{link-to}}.

Real-time

  • ember-cli-flashstars359 - Simple, highly configurable flash messages for ember-cli.

Routing addons

  • ember-component-routesstars26 - Render components directly from routes in Ember.js.
  • ember-redirectstars29 - This addon aims to be a simple and easy way to preform route based redirects with minimal effort.
  • ember-router-scrollstars201 - Scroll to top with preserved browser history scroll position.

Resolver customization

  • ember-cli-extended-resolver - This addons allows to modify default files structure to be more feature-grouped.

Security

  • ember-canstars266 - Simple authorisation addon for Ember.js apps.
  • ember-permissionsstars8 - Permission management for Ember applications.

Service Workers

  • ember-cli-workboxstars14 - Offline caching as a progressive enhancement using service workers.
  • ember-service-workerstars229 - A pluggable approach to Service Workers for Ember.js.
  • ember-service-worker-indexstars17 - An Ember.js Service Worker plugin that caches the index.html file.
  • ember-service-worker-asset-cachestars27 - An Ember.js Service Worker plugin that caches an Ember.js app's asset files.
  • ember-service-worker-cache-firststars7 - A cache first Ember.js Service Worker plugin.
  • ember-service-worker-cache-fallbackstars16 - An Ember.js Service Worker plugin that resorts to a cached fallback version when the network request fails.
  • ember-service-worker-emberfire-messagingstars12 - Firebase Cloud Messaging service worker support for Emberfire apps.
  • ember-service-worker-unregistrationstars0 - An Ember.js plugin that unregister service workers when ember-service-worker is disabled.
  • ember-service-worker-request-chaosstars2 - Like Netflix's Chaos Monkey but for your Ember.js SPA's API requests.
  • ember-service-worker-project-entagled-registrationstars0 - This addon is to be used along with ember-service-worker to ensure that the service worker being used is paired properly to the project.
  • ember-service-worker-cache-renderedstars1 - Ember.js service worker plugin for storing rendered html in cache, really useful for fastboot.
  • ember-service-worker-update-notifystars25 - Update notification for service workers.
  • ember-service-worker-enqueuestars4 - An Ember.js Service Worker plugin that catches failed mutation requests e.g POST, PUT, DELETE and queues them for background processing.
  • ember-service-worker-premberstars6 - An Ember.js Service Worker plugin that caches the index.html files for each prember route.

SSR / Server Side Rendering

  • ember-fastbootstars851 - Server-side rendering for Ember.js apps.
  • glimmer-ssr-test - Making a Glimmer.js app be rendered in the server.

Static site generators & SEO

  • ember-metastars13 - Setup meta for your Prember/Ember.js blog to support opengraph, microdata, Facebook, Twitter, Slack etc.
  • prember-rss-feedstars3 - Ship RSS feeds for your Prember site.
  • premberstars175 - Prerender Ember.js apps with Fastboot at build time.

Styling

  • ember-cli-sassstars280 - Use node-sass to preprocess your ember-cli app's files, with support for sourceMaps and include paths.

Templating

  • ember-template-component-importstars14 - This addon allows you to use import-style syntax to create local bindings to a component within a template file.
  • ember-cli-jsx-templatesstars16 - TSX/JSX support for ember templates.
  • Emblem.jsstars1.1k - Ember.js-friendly, indented syntax alternative for Handlebars.js.

Testing

  • ember-qunit-decoratorsstars5 - Use ES6 or TypeScript decorators for QUnit tests in your Ember.js app.
  • ember-cli-addon-testsstars35 - Test helpers for testing Ember CLI addons inside the context of a real Ember.js app.
  • ember-cli-code-coveragestars183 - Code coverage for ember apps using Istanbul.
  • ember-cli-mirage - Build, test and demo your app using a JSON API-compliant client-side server.
  • ember-cli-mochastars146 - Mocha and Chai tests for ember-cli applications.
  • ember-cli-page-objectstars272 - This ember-cli addon eases the construction of page objects on your acceptance and integration tests.
  • ember-cli-yaddastars40 - Write cucumber specs for ember-cli applications.
  • ember-concurrency-test-waiterstars21 - Easily enable test waiters for ember-concurrency tasks.
  • ember-examstars263 - Run your tests with randomization, splitting, and parallelization for beautiful tests.
  • ember-percystars67 - Ember.js addon for visual regression testing with Percy.
  • ember-qunitstars258 - QUnit test helpers for Ember.js.
  • ember-test-friendly-error-handlerstars15 - Build testable error handlers that don't throw in production...
  • ember-test-selectorsstars258 - Enabling better element selectors in Ember.js tests.
  • ember-test-setupstars6 - Testing shorthands to reduce duplication.
  • ember-window-mockstars52 - Use window global as an Ember.js service that can be mocked in tests.
  • mirage-gluestars4 - This program reads your API endpoint and creates or appends response to relevant mirage fixture file(s).
  • ember-sinonstars66 - Ember CLI addon adding support for sinon.js.

Text

  • ember-text-measurerstars38 - Simple Ember.js Service to measure the width of a string in a performant way.

Tree Shaking

  • ember-cli-tree-shakerstars75 - This is a testbed for the new tree-shaking and code splitting work from Kelly Selden and Alex Navasardyan.

TypeScript

  • ember-cli-typescriptstars348 - Use TypeScript in your Ember.js apps!
  • ember-typingsstars13 - Typescript type definitions for ember.js.

UI libs

  • ember-bootstrap - Provides a collection of native Ember.js components that mimic the original Bootstrap plugins and components in an ember friendly way.
  • Frontilestars26 - Frontile aims to provide the legos (components, helpers, modifiers, and styles) necessary for building consistent and powerful Ember.js apps.
  • ember-cli-uniqstars3 - Default components for Ember.js that implement the Uniplaces Design System.
  • ember-element-uistars6 - Provides element-ui for ember.
  • ember-elementsstars38 - a UI toolkit in Ember
  • ember-ghost-casper-templatestars37 - A static site version of the default personal blogging theme for Ghost.

  • ember-radicalstars22 - Feather light, fully accessible DDAU component library for your Ember.js apps.

  • ember-power-selectstars521 - The extensible select component built for ember.

Codemods

  • ember-es6-class-codemodstars60 - A codemod-cli project for converting Ember.js objects to es6 native classes.
  • ember-native-class-codemodstars60 - A codemod for transforming your ember app code to native JavaScript class syntax with decorators!
  • ember-cli-mirage-faker-codemodstars2 - This codemod is to help transition from importing faker through ember-cli-mirage, to instead import it directly from faker.
  • ember-mocha-codemodsstars4 - Codemod scripts for ember-mocha.
  • ember-module-migratorstars77 - Automated migration for new Ember.js application layout.
  • ember-qunit-codemodstars37 - This codemod is intended to automatically convert your projects from the older moduleFor* syntax of ember-qunit@2 to the newer syntax.
  • ember-test-helpers-codemodstars29 - Codemod to transform your Ember.js tests to use @ember/test-helpers.
  • es5-getter-ember-codemodstars33 - This codemod is intended to automatically convert your usage of get, and getProperties to use traditional object dot notation.
  • qunit-dom-codemodstars12 - Basic codemod to automatically convert your assertions to qunit-dom assertions.
  • test-selectors-codemodstars7 - A codemode for fixing the ember-test-selectors testSelector helper deprecation.
  • ember-on-codemodstars0 - Replace use of Ember.on.
  • ember-memory-leaks-codemodstars0 - A collection of codemod's for fixing memory leaks in Ember.js applications.
  • ember-3x-codemodsstars0 - A Codemod with a collection of transforms to address Ember.js 3.x deprecations.
  • ember-computed-getter-codemodstars0 - Ember.js Computed Getter Codemod.

Examples

  • A list of open source Ember.js appsstars235
  • Simple contact manager demo app for ember-orbitstars15
  • API Docsstars56 - This application was built to display our versioned API docs.
  • guides-appstars21 - Replacement for emberjs/guides and the Ember.js Guides.
  • Buildsstars12 - This is the application that the Ember.js team built to display our various release channels.
  • HospitalRunstars5.9k - Ember.js front end for HospitalRun hospitalrun.io.
  • Rancherstars474 - Rancher is enterprise management for Kubernetes.
  • Super Rentalsstars140 - Super Rentals is a good starter project to get acclimated to the Ember.js way of doing things.
  • Travis CIstars585 - The Ember.js web client for Travis CI.
  • Vault - A Tool for Managing Secrets (Hashicorp).
  • ember-osf-webstars107 - Ember.js front-end for the Open Science Framework.
  • ember-graphql-examplesstars4 - Examples of using GraphQL in Ember.js.
  • ember-rolodexstars0 - An example of what an Ember.js tutorial between the quick start and Super Rents could look like.
  • ember-styleguidestars72
  • Ghost Admin Clientstars544
  • emberclearstars164 - Encrypted Chat. No History. No Logs. + MU & TS.
  • Ember.js nested engines example app + Fastboot.stars1
  • Percy's frontend web application, built with Ember.js.
  • Fire Trackerstars6 - KPCC's tool for following & researching California wildfires.
  • skylines-project - Live tracking, flight database and competition framework.
  • PIX - PIX.
  • ember-monorepo-demostars6
  • documize.comstars1.3k
  • New York City Census Reporting Toolstars30
  • Medicine Inventorystars0 - Sample application developed with Ember CLI, Corber.io, ember-element-ui.
  • octane-ecommercestars24 - Ember Octane + FastBoot + Algolia + PayPal + Formspree (s, v, d).
  • Rust Package Registrystars1.9k - crates.io
  • Ember.js RealWorld Implementationstars152 - Ember.js codebase containing real world examples (CRUD, auth, advanced patterns, etc) that adheres to the RealWorld spec and API.

  • An ember integration for building visual programming editors with blockly.stars4

Examples Glimmer

  • breethe-clientstars72 - Air Quality Data for Locations around the World.
  • Glimmeroidsstars12 - Asteroids implementation using Glimmer.js.
  • glimmer-hn-pwastars28 - A Demonstration Of Hacker News Progressive Web App Powered By Glimmer.js.
  • the-chosenstars0 - Glimmer.js project created to learn & decide easier during our scrum dailies meeting who is the next person to share status.
  • glimmer_eatsstars0 - A demo PWA built with Glimmer.js.
  • built-with-spaghettistars1 - Built with Spaghetti aims to function as a gateway to web art.
  • glimmer-live-chatstars12 - A Live chat application crafted using Glimmer.js.
  • glimmer-synthstars12 - Synthesizer built using WebAudio and Glimmer.js.
  • glimmer-js-online-offline-demostars2 - Sample Glimmer.js app: online/offline browser events.
  • glimmer-qriousstars0 - Glimmer.js components using QRious library to generate QR code in webpage.
  • glimmerjs-address-book-demostars0 - Example Glimmer.js application - AddressBook Demo.
  • glimmer-dashboardstars0 - Glimmer.js dashboard example.
  • glimmer-redux-todostars0 - Todo app written with Glimmer.js and Redux.
  • glimmer-pongstars5 - Pong game written using Glimmer.js and SVGs.
  • glimmer-materialstars5 - A Glimmer.js wrapper for Material Components for the Web.
  • glimmer-of-lifestars1 - An implementation of Conway's Game of Life using Glimmer.js.
  • vorfreudestars4 - When you can't wait but have to.

  • glimmer-hangmanstars0 - A implementation of the well-known game 'Hangman' in Glimmer.js.

Tools

  • Ember Data Sails Adapterstars91 - An Ember Data adaptor for the Sails.js sockets.
  • Ember Data WordPress Adapterstars40 - An Ember Data adapter for the WordPress JSON API.
  • Ember Gist - Demo Ember CLI'eque apps using GitHub Gist.
  • Ember Inspectorstars940 - Adds an Ember.js tab to Chrome or Firefox Developer Tools that allows you to inspect Ember.js objects in your application. - Officially maintained.
  • Ember Perfstars75 - Measure user-percieved performance data in your ember.js app.
  • ember-cli-diff - A simple tool to see differences between new ember apps.
  • ember-cli - The command line interface for ambitious web applications.
  • ember-data-model-maker - UI to make ember-data models & payload examples.
  • Glimmer Playground - An Glimmer.js playground.
  • mberstars30 - Ember CLI replacement. Currently alpha.
  • remote-inspectorstars97 - Lets you inspect apps running on different devices/browsers over the network using websockets.
  • Ember Unused Componentsstars43 - This script searches for unused components in your Ember project
